calendar.matters:
Petition By Guardian Ad Litem To Create A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der explained the purpose of the alternative language in the Trust and the issue of bond. Both matters were taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harrison.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition By Guardian Ad Litem To Create A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Continued To Jun-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Guardian Ad Litem). Nancy Rasch for Dianasti Potes.

With regard to the Special Needs Trust being under Court supervision, Ms. Rasch stated that the Daughter has concern about fees, that perhaps the Trustee could account to the LPS Conservator informally and that in the event there is problem it could be brought to the Court's attention. Mr. Der expressed concern about the fees outweighing the income of the Trust. The Petition to Create A Special Needs Trust was continued to June 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will explore the issue with the LPS Conservatorship office.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (274 Sagamore Street, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Dianasti Potes.

The sale was confirmed at $475,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $100,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition (subject to a written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
